title: Senior MLOps Engineer
summary: Senior MLOps Engineer with 2 years of experience. Focused on measurable outcomes, cross-functional collaboration and reliable knowledge graph extraction signals. Core strengths include TensorFlow, FastAPI, Scikit-learn, PyTorch.
